title: ScanRequest
description: Body the web app POSTs to ENGINE_URL. See ENGINE_CONTRACT.md §1.

signature.description: hex HMAC-SHA256 of the canonical contract (64 lowercase hex chars).

connected_inbox.description: The inbox actually being acted on; sent explicitly so the engine compares, not infers.

token_ref.description: Handle for a short-lived read-only Gmail token. null for the fixture milestone. Never a raw password or long-lived token.
